column18: Ignore everything to the right of this, its stuff for calculation reasons, to do calcs the same way as they're performed in game

column4: Base enemy damage is 285.87-400.22 at enemy level 100 currently, and each Nexus tier (above tier 0) scales enemy damage by x1.2589. So Nexus tier 2 (which is equivalent to Crucible Floor 10) -> 400.22*(1.2589^2). Crucible 80 would be equivalent to Nexus Tier 16 (if it existed). Keep in mind these numbers can change at any time though
